hero.name: Marcin Szczęsny
bio: 20+ years in sales and business relationship management — combining commercial intuition with data-driven decision making.
Since 2024 actively growing in Data Science & AI. Member of the elite Masterclass group, co-creating innovative ML and AI startups.
Tech Lead at Career Guide since Aug 2025 — responsible for platform architecture, Code Review, and coordinating 5 teams (20+ people).

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Applications built with passion for AI and data

items.title: Career Guide
items.subtitle: Career Development Platform
items.description: Platform helping users develop their careers. Personalised personality and skills tests, intelligent job profile matching system, and a CV creator.

items.title: PiktoBajki
items.subtitle: AI Picture Stories
items.description: App for generating interactive picture stories. GPT-4o for text, DALL·E 3 for images, TTS for voice. Subscription system and user resource management.

items.title: Half Marathon
items.subtitle: ML Time Prediction
items.description: Interactive app predicting half-marathon finish time. GPT-4o-mini recognizes runner data, ML model trained on 20 000+ Wrocław participants.

items.title: Audio Notes
items.subtitle: Voice notes + AI search
items.description: Voice note recording with automatic transcription (Whisper). Semantic search via Qdrant vector database. Multilingual support.

items.title: Find Friends
items.subtitle: EDA + Clustering
items.description: EDA tool for finding people with similar interests. PyCaret clustering identifies user groups based on survey responses.

items.title: Sales Reports
items.subtitle: Sales Analysis
items.description: Sales analysis app with interactive Plotly charts. Parses custom report files, compares periods, visualizes changes in revenue and margin.

items.title: Iris Dataset
items.description: Classic Iris dataset analysis — visualizations, descriptive statistics, classification.

items.title: Titanic Survival
items.description: Analysis of Titanic passenger survival. EDA, feature engineering, ML models.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Let's talk about a project
availability_items: Permanent position in Data Science / AI
